understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` for the current level (BP35), avoiding spikes (`u`/`v`) which immediately end the attempt; complete levels efficiently within the attempt/turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: On each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK/UNDO. After any horizontal move, the character then automatically travels in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid support tile (e.g., `o`, `m`, `w`), hits a hazard (spikes end the run), or reaches the goal `+`. CLICK removes breakable/clickable tiles (e.g., `x`) at a specified [x,y] without moving the player, typically to open a fall path in the gravity direction; UNDO reverts the prior action. Each attempt has a fixed turn budget, and failure restarts the level for the next attempt.
